es.afk_note_text: Escribe cualquier mensaje para desactivar el modo AFK
es.no_permission: ❌ No tienes permisos para usar este comando.
es.admin_only: ❌ Solo administradores pueden usar este comando.
es.user_muted_desc: ha sido muteado en este canal.
es.user_unmuted_desc: puede hablar nuevamente en este canal.
es.language_set_desc: El idioma del servidor ha sido cambiado a Español
es.error: ❌ Hubo un error al ejecutar este comando.
es.announce_sent_desc: El anuncio ha sido enviado al canal
es.slowmode_set_desc: Los usuarios deben esperar {time} segundos entre mensajes
es.slowmode_disabled_desc: Los usuarios pueden enviar mensajes sin restricción
es.lock_channel_desc: El canal ha sido bloqueado. Solo moderadores pueden escribir.
es.unlock_channel_desc: El canal ha sido desbloqueado. Todos pueden escribir.
es.warn_setup_desc: La configuración del sistema de advertencias ha sido actualizada
es.event_no_permission: ❌ Solo el creador del evento o un administrador puede modificarlo
es.event_rsvp_confirmed: ✅ ¡Has confirmado tu asistencia a este evento!
es.event_rsvp_maybe: ❓ Te has marcado como 'tal vez' para este evento
es.event_waitlist: ⏳ El evento está lleno. Has sido agregado a la lista de espera
es.event_promoted: 🎉 ¡Buenas noticias! Se liberó un lugar y has sido confirmado
es.boost_removed_desc: ha retirado su boost del servidor
es.boost_channel_set: ✅ Canal de notificaciones de boost configurado
es.cmd_perm_user_required: ❌ Debes especificar un usuario para esta acción
es.cmd_perm_role_required: ❌ Debes especificar un rol para esta acción
es.cmd_perm_user_added: ✅ Usuario {user} agregado a los permisos del comando /{command}
es.cmd_perm_role_added: ✅ Rol {role} agregado a los permisos del comando /{command}
es.cmd_perm_user_removed: ✅ Usuario {user} removido de los permisos del comando /{command}
es.cmd_perm_role_removed: ✅ Rol {role} removido de los permisos del comando /{command}
es.cmd_perm_already_has: ❌ Este usuario/rol ya tiene permisos para este comando
es.cmd_perm_not_found: ❌ Este usuario/rol no tiene permisos para este comando
es.cmd_perm_cleared: ✅ Todos los permisos del comando /{command} han sido eliminados
es.cmd_perm_denied: ❌ No tienes permiso para usar este comando

en.afk_note_text: Write any message to deactivate AFK mode
en.no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command.
en.admin_only: ❌ Only administrators can use this command.
en.user_muted_desc: has been muted in this channel.
en.user_unmuted_desc: can speak again in this channel.
en.user_kicked_desc: has been kicked from the server.
en.user_banned_desc: has been banned from the server.
en.language_set_desc: Server language has been changed to English
en.error: ❌ There was an error executing this command.
en.announce_sent_desc: The announcement has been sent to the channel
en.slowmode_set_desc: Users must wait {time} seconds between messages
en.slowmode_disabled_desc: Users can send messages without restriction
en.lock_channel_desc: The channel has been locked. Only moderators can write.
en.unlock_channel_desc: The channel has been unlocked. Everyone can write.
en.warn_setup_desc: The warning system configuration has been updated
en.event_no_permission: ❌ Only the event creator or an administrator can modify it
en.event_rsvp_confirmed: ✅ You confirmed attendance for this event!
en.event_rsvp_maybe: ❓ You marked yourself as 'maybe' for this event
en.event_waitlist: ⏳ Event is full. You've been added to the waitlist
en.event_promoted: 🎉 Great news! A spot opened up and you've been confirmed
en.boost_thanks_desc: Thank you for boosting the server!
en.boost_removed_desc: has removed their boost from the server
en.cmd_perm_user_required: ❌ You must specify a user for this action
en.cmd_perm_role_required: ❌ You must specify a role for this action
en.cmd_perm_already_has: ❌ This user/role already has permissions for this command
en.cmd_perm_not_found: ❌ This user/role doesn't have permissions for this command
en.cmd_perm_cleared: ✅ All permissions for /{command} command have been cleared
en.cmd_perm_denied: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command
